en-US.title: Esco Beach Club
en-US.subtitle: Private Events & Perks
en-US.description:
Esco Beach Club is the private members app for curated events, partner perks, and premium beach-club access.

Inside the app, members can:
• Discover upcoming club events and VIP experiences
• Unlock partner perks across hospitality, dining, travel, and wellness
• Manage their digital member identity and benefits
• Book tables and submit private-event requests
• Track loyalty progress, rewards, and savings
• Access invite links, referrals, and member-only updates

Built for a polished, members-first experience, Esco Beach Club keeps access, reservations, perks, and account controls in one place.

Privacy-first by design:
• Optional background location is used to recognize venue arrival for in-club offers
• Camera access is reserved for staff QR scanning flows
• Account deletion includes a 30-day restore window

Download Esco Beach Club to manage your membership and stay close to the club.
en-US.releaseNotes: Welcome to the first App Store release of Esco Beach Club. Members can access curated events, partner perks, digital membership, bookings, referrals, and account controls in one premium app.
en-US.promoText: Unlock curated events, partner perks, and members-only access designed around life at Esco Beach Club.
